name: Expunged!!!
description: He is a powerful 3D entity created by Dave that takes on a physical form resembling Bambi due to taking his "Splitathon" sprite sheet that tortures the people whoever cheats. However, the sprite sheet ends up being corrupted in "Unfairness" where he gets madder. He ultimately enters his true form in "Exploitation".Yeah lol :p
creator: XandyBoii190
